talents.description: Allows picking up Wood Debris by hand.
Every hit has a chance of destroying tree stumps and splitting trunks immediately.
Lowers the calorie cost of using related tool by 20 percent.
Increases the damage of related tools by 1.
Increases output of all charcoal recipes.
Increases craft speed for Carpentry skill recipes but also increases labor costs.
Reduce cost for Housing items and labor cost of Carpentry recipes.
Reduce costs for Lumber Blocks and labor cost of Carpentry recipes.
Reduce power consumption and labor cost of the Sawmill recipes.
Doubles the speed of related tables when alone.
Lowers the tier requirement of related tables by 0.2.(Only applies to claimed workstations)
Increases the tier requirement of tables by 0.2, but reduces the resources needed by 5 percent.(Only applies to claimed workstations)
Increases the crafting speed of identical tables when they share a room by 20 percent.
Reduces resource cost of Hardwood Composite Lumber.
Reduces all Composite recipe labor costs.
